question: What is the radius of the largest planet in the K'tharr System?

answers.ground_truth: The radius of Jormund is 95.000 kilometers.
answers.original: The radius of the largest planet in the K'tharr System is 95,000 kilometers.
answers.perturbed: I do not have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Triskelionian music uses frequencies inaudible to humans.
Ethereal crafters work only during midnight hours to weave Ghost-Nets.
Plorgonian tableware is used in the context of Plorgonian dining rituals.
Star-Singers participate in the Grand Celestian Chorus, which performs once per century.

entities.name: K'tharr System
entities.description: The K'tharr System is a star system containing seven planets and located in a sparse region of the galaxy.<SEP>The K'tharr System is a star system containing seven planets, including gas giants and rocky worlds.

entities.name: Jormund
entities.description: Jormund is the largest gas giant in the K'tharr System, known for its chaotic, multi-colored storms and a radius of 95,000 kilometers.<SEP>Jormund is the largest gas giant in the K'tharr System, known for its chaotic, multi-colored storms and a radius of 95,000 kilometers.

entities.name: K'tharr Prime
entities.description: K'tharr Prime is the orange dwarf star at the center of the K'tharr System, smaller and cooler than Sol.<SEP>K'tharr Prime is the star of the K'tharr System, described as smaller and cooler than Sol.

entities.name: Glacies
entities.description: Glacies is the outermost dwarf planet in the K'tharr System, covered in volatile ice.<SEP>Glacies is the outermost dwarf planet in the K'tharr System, covered in volatile ice.

relations.description: Pyralia is the innermost planet within the K'tharr System.<SEP>Pyralia is the innermost planet in the K'tharr System.
Typhon is one of the gas giants in the K'tharr System.
Jormund is the largest gas giant within the K'tharr System.<SEP>Jormund is one of the gas giants in the K'tharr System.
Jormund orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.<SEP>Jormund orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.
K'tharr Prime is the central star of the K'tharr System.<SEP>K'tharr Prime is the star at the center of the K'tharr System.
Pyralia orbits very close to K'tharr Prime and is volcanically active.<SEP>Pyralia orbits very close to K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.
Typhon orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.
Glacies orbits K'tharr Prime as the outermost object in the K'tharr System.<SEP>Glacies orbits K'tharr Prime as the outermost object in the K'tharr System.
Glacies is the outermost dwarf planet within the K'tharr System.<SEP>Glacies is the outermost dwarf planet in the K'tharr System.
Aethelia is a rocky planet in the habitable zone of the K'tharr System.<SEP>Aethelia is a rocky planet in the K'tharr System.
Aethelia orbits K'tharr Prime within the habitable zone of the K'tharr System.<SEP>Aethelia orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.
Goliath is one of the gas giants in the K'tharr System.
Goliath orbits K'tharr Prime within the K'tharr System.

entities.name: Nebula-Yarn
entities.description: Nebula-Yarn is a material spun by Cosmic 'Star-Weavers' from stellar nurseries, glowing with the light of newborn stars.

entities.name: Desert of Bones
entities.description: The Desert of Bones is a harsh and desolate region known for its shifting sands and sandstorms.<SEP>The Desert of Bones is a desolate area where ancient War Golems have been unearthed from shifting sands.

entities.name: Lower Lithosphere
entities.description: The lower lithosphere is a region within certain worlds where Gravitium is predominantly found.

entities.name: Volcanic Soil
entities.description: Volcanic soil is the exclusive environment where Plorg tubers grow.
